title: Interaction between Formation Protocol and Electrolyte Composition during Solid-Electrolyte Interphase Formation: A Model-Supported Investigation - Dataset
author: Schomburg, Felix
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Dataset of the publication  Interaction between Formation Protocol and Electrolyte Composition during Solid-Electrolyte Interphase Formation: A Model-Supported Investigation  published in  Journal  in  Year  by Schomburg et al.   In the study, an electrolyte and formation variation was conducted using three-electrode cells at 40°C: 4 electrolytes (1M LiPF6 in EC:DEC (1:1, by wt.)+2VC%, 1M LiPF6 in EC:EMC (3:7, by wt.)+2VC%, 1M LiPF6 in EC:DMC (1:1, by wt.)+2VC%, 1M LiPF6 in EC:EMC:DMC (3:2:5, by wt.)+2VC%) were formed with two formation protocols and subsequently electrochemically characterized. More information about the test procedure and used equipment can be found in the publication ( DOI ).
